title: Generate column names instead of labels
poc: create table table_3a as select count(*) from sys.tables;
create table table_3a as select count(*) as x from sys.tables;
key_bug_features: Generate column names instead of labels in queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table_1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 AS SELECT id, name FROM test_table_1 WHERE id > 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM test_table_2;
